member.name: T:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler
member.summary: Handles agent process lifecycle: launching, heartbeats, output parsing, process exit, and stopping.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._MissionOutput
member.summary: Accumulates agent stdout per mission for pipeline handoff.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._MissionHeartbeatWrites
member.summary: Throttles mission heartbeat persistence so verbose logs do not rewrite mission/voyage rows on every output line.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._MissionFinalMessageFiles
member.summary: Tracks per-mission final response artifacts so canonical agent output can be recovered even if live streaming is noisy.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._PendingLaunches
member.summary: Tracks launches that have started but have not yet completed HandleLaunchAgentAsync registration. This closes the race where a fast process can emit output or exit before the PID mapping is written.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._ProcessToCaptain
member.summary: Maps process IDs to captain IDs for progress tracking.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._ProcessToMission
member.summary: Maps process IDs to mission IDs for per-mission progress tracking.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._HandledProcessExits
member.summary: Tracks process IDs whose exit has been received via the OnProcessExited callback. Used by the health check to avoid racing with the async exit handler. Entries are pruned after 5 minutes.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler._ProcessHeartbeatLoops
member.summary: Tracks per-process liveness heartbeat loops so silent-but-busy runtimes still refresh telemetry.
Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.GetAndClearMissionOutput(System.String)
member.summary: Set or update the WebSocket hub reference (created after this handler).
Retrieve and clear accumulated stdout output for a mission. Used by pipeline handoff to pass agent output to the next stage.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.IsProcessExitHandled(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check whether a process exit has already been received for the given PID. The health check uses this to avoid triggering recovery for a process whose exit is already being handled by the async exit callback.
member.returns: True if the exit callback has already fired for this PID.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.SetWebSocketHub(Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub)
member.summary: Set or update the WebSocket hub reference (created after this handler).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.ValidateCaptainModelAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Captain,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validate that the captain's configured model can be launched by its runtime. Returns null if validation succeeds, otherwise an error message.
member.returns: Null if valid, otherwise an error message.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.ValidateModelAsync(Armada.Core.Enums.AgentRuntimeEnum,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validate that the given runtime can start with the requested model. Returns null if validation succeeds, otherwise an error message.
member.returns: Null if valid, otherwise an error message.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleLaunchAgentAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Captain,Armada.Core.Models.Mission,Armada.Core.Models.Dock)
member.summary: Launch an agent process for the given captain, mission, and dock.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.StartProcessLivenessHeartbeat(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Start a periodic heartbeat loop for a tracked process so telemetry stays fresh even when the runtime is busy but not emitting output.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.StopProcessLivenessHeartbeat(System.Int32)
member.summary: Stop the periodic heartbeat loop for a tracked process.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.IsTrackedProcessAlive(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determine whether the tracked wrapper process is still alive.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleProcessStarted(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Register PID-to-captain/mission mapping as soon as a launched process exposes a PID.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleAgentHeartbeat(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Handle heartbeat from an agent process output line.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleAgentOutput(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Handle output from an agent process, parsing progress signals.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleAgentProcessExited(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Handle agent process exit event.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleAgentProcessExitedAsync(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Async handler for agent process exit, delegating to the admiral service.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.AgentLifecycleHandler.HandleStopAgentAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Captain)
member.summary: Stop the agent process for the given captain.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.ArmadaServer
member.summary: Admiral server orchestrating REST API, MCP server, and agent coordination. Routes, MCP tools, WebSocket commands, agent lifecycle, and mission landing are each handled by dedicated classes — this class wires them together.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.ArmadaServer.OnStopping
member.summary: Callback invoked when the server is stopping, allowing the host to unblock.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.ArmadaServer.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.ArmadaServer.StartAsync
member.summary: Start the Admiral server.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.ArmadaServer.Stop
member.summary: Stop the Admiral server.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler
member.summary: Serves static files for the web dashboard. Checks an external directory first (React build output), then falls back to embedded wwwroot resources (legacy dashboard).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler.SetExternalPath(System.String)
member.summary: Set the external dashboard directory path. When set, files are served from this directory before falling back to embedded resources.
member.param: Absolute path to the dashboard build output directory (e.g., dist/).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler.TryGetFile(System.String,System.Byte[]@,System.String@)
member.summary: Try to read a static file for the given URL path. Checks external dashboard directory first, then falls back to embedded resources.
member.returns: True if the file was found.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler.TryGetIndex(System.Byte[]@,System.String@)
member.summary: Try to get the SPA index.html fallback for client-side routing.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler.HasExternalDashboard
member.summary: Returns true if an external dashboard directory is configured and exists.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Dashboard.StaticFileHandler.ListResources
member.summary: List all embedded resource names (for debugging).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.BackupArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for the armada_backup command.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.BackupArgs.OutputPath
member.summary: Optional output path for the ZIP backup file. Defaults to ~/.armada/backups/armada-backup-{timestamp}.zip.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for creating a captain.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.Name
member.summary: Captain display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.Runtime
member.summary: Agent runtime: ClaudeCode, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, or Custom.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.SystemInstructions
member.summary: System instructions for this captain. Injected into every mission prompt.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.Model
member.summary: AI model identifier. Null means the runtime selects its default model.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.AllowedPersonas
member.summary: JSON array of persona names this captain can fill. Null means any persona.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainCreateArgs.PreferredPersona
member.summary: Preferred persona for dispatch routing priority.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a captain identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainIdArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Captain ID (cpt_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainLogArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for retrieving a captain's session log.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainLogArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Captain ID (cpt_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainLogArgs.Lines
member.summary: Number of lines to return (default 100).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainLogArgs.Offset
member.summary: Line offset to start from (default 0).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for updating a captain.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Captain ID (cpt_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.Name
member.summary: New display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.Runtime
member.summary: New agent runtime: ClaudeCode, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, or Custom.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.SystemInstructions
member.summary: New system instructions for this captain.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.Model
member.summary: New AI model identifier. Null means the runtime selects its default model.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.AllowedPersonas
member.summary: JSON array of persona names this captain can fill. Null means any persona.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.CaptainUpdateArgs.PreferredPersona
member.summary: Preferred persona for dispatch routing priority.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.DeleteMultipleArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for batch deleting multiple entities by ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.DeleteMultipleArgs.Ids
member.summary: List of entity IDs to delete.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.DockIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a dock identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.DockIdArgs.DockId
member.summary: Dock ID (dck_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for the unified enumeration tool.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.EntityType
member.summary: Entity type to enumerate: fleets, vessels, captains, missions, voyages, docks, signals, events.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.PageNumber
member.summary: Page number (1-based, default 1).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.PageSize
member.summary: Results per page (default 100, max 1000).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.Order
member.summary: Sort order: CreatedAscending, CreatedDescending.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.CreatedAfter
member.summary: ISO 8601 timestamp — only return entities created after this time.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.CreatedBefore
member.summary: ISO 8601 timestamp — only return entities created before this time.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.Status
member.summary: Filter by status.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.FleetId
member.summary: Filter by fleet ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Filter by vessel ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Filter by captain ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: Filter by voyage ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Filter by mission ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.EventType
member.summary: Filter by event type string.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.SignalType
member.summary: Filter by signal type.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.ToCaptainId
member.summary: Filter by recipient captain ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.UnreadOnly
member.summary: Return only unread signals.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.IncludeDescription
member.summary: Include Description field on missions and voyages (default false). When false, a DescriptionLength hint is returned instead.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.IncludeContext
member.summary: Include ProjectContext and StyleGuide fields on vessels (default false). When false, length hints are returned instead.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.IncludeTestOutput
member.summary: Include TestOutput field on merge queue entries (default false). When false, a TestOutputLength hint is returned instead.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.IncludePayload
member.summary: Include full Payload on event entities (default false). When false, a PayloadLength hint is returned instead.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.IncludeMessage
member.summary: Include full Message body on signal entities (default false). When false, a MessageLength hint is returned instead.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.EnumerateArgs.ToEnumerationQuery
member.summary: Convert to an EnumerationQuery for database operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing an event identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventIdArgs.EventId
member.summary: Event ID (evt_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventListArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for listing events with optional filters.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventListArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Filter events by mission ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventListArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Filter events by captain ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventListArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: Filter events by voyage ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.EventListArgs.Limit
member.summary: Maximum number of events to return (default 50).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetCreateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for creating a fleet.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetCreateArgs.Name
member.summary: Fleet name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetCreateArgs.Description
member.summary: Fleet description.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a fleet identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetIdArgs.FleetId
member.summary: Fleet ID (flt_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetUpdateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for updating a fleet.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetUpdateArgs.FleetId
member.summary: Fleet ID (flt_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetUpdateArgs.Name
member.summary: New fleet name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetUpdateArgs.Description
member.summary: New fleet description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.FleetUpdateArgs.DefaultPipelineId
member.summary: Default pipeline ID for dispatches to vessels in this fleet (ppl_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate
member.summary: Delegate matching the RegisterTool signature shared by McpHttpServer and McpServer.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.McpToolRegistrar
member.summary: Registers all Armada MCP tools on any MCP server transport. Shared between the HTTP MCP server and the stdio MCP server.
Register all Armada tools using the provided registration delegate.
member.param: Tool registration delegate (works with both McpHttpServer and McpServer).
Landing service for retry landing operations.
Callback to kill a captain's agent process by captain ID. Called before RecallCaptainAsync.
Agent lifecycle handler used for captain model validation.
Prompt template service for template operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for adding a branch to the merge queue.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Associated mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Target vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.BranchName
member.summary: Branch name to merge.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.TargetBranch
member.summary: Target branch (defaults to main).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.Priority
member.summary: Queue priority (lower = higher, default 0).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEnqueueArgs.TestCommand
member.summary: Custom test command to run.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEntryIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a merge entry identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MergeEntryIdArgs.EntryId
member.summary: Merge entry ID (mrg_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for creating a standalone mission.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs.Title
member.summary: Mission title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs.Description
member.summary: Mission description/instructions.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Target vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: Optional voyage ID to associate with (vyg_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionCreateArgs.Persona
member.summary: Persona for this mission (e.g. Worker, Architect, Judge, TestEngineer).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a mission identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionIdArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionLogArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for retrieving a mission's session log.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionLogArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionLogArgs.Lines
member.summary: Number of lines to return (default 100).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionLogArgs.Offset
member.summary: Line offset to start from (default 0).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRestartArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for restarting a failed or cancelled mission.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRestartArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRestartArgs.Title
member.summary: Optional new title. If null or empty, the original title is preserved.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRestartArgs.Description
member.summary: Optional new description/instructions. If null or empty, the original description is preserved.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRetryLandingArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for retrying a failed mission landing.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionRetryLandingArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix) to retry landing for.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionTransitionArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for transitioning a mission to a new status.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionTransitionArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionTransitionArgs.Status
member.summary: Target status: Pending, Assigned, InProgress, WorkProduced, Testing, Review, Complete, Failed, LandingFailed, Cancelled.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for updating an existing mission.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.MissionId
member.summary: Mission ID (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.Title
member.summary: New mission title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.Description
member.summary: New mission description/instructions.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.VesselId
member.summary: New target vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: New voyage association (vyg_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.Priority
member.summary: New priority (lower is higher priority).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.BranchName
member.summary: Git branch name for this mission.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.PrUrl
member.summary: Pull request URL.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.ParentMissionId
member.summary: Parent mission ID for sub-tasks (msn_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.MissionUpdateArgs.Persona
member.summary: Persona for this mission (e.g. Worker, Architect, Judge, TestEngineer).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PersonaArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for persona operations.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PersonaArgs.Name
member.summary: Persona name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PersonaArgs.Description
member.summary: Persona description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PersonaArgs.PromptTemplateName
member.summary: Prompt template name for this persona.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for pipeline operations.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineArgs.Name
member.summary: Pipeline name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineArgs.Description
member.summary: Pipeline description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineArgs.Stages
member.summary: Ordered list of pipeline stages.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineStageArgs
member.summary: A single stage in a pipeline definition.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineStageArgs.PersonaName
member.summary: Persona name for this stage.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineStageArgs.IsOptional
member.summary: Whether this stage is optional.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PipelineStageArgs.Description
member.summary: Description of what this stage does.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PromptTemplateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for prompt template operations.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PromptTemplateArgs.Name
member.summary: Template name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PromptTemplateArgs.Content
member.summary: Template content with {Placeholder} parameters.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PromptTemplateArgs.Description
member.summary: Template description.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PurgeMergeEntriesArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for batch purging merge queue entries by ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PurgeMergeEntriesArgs.EntryIds
member.summary: List of merge entry IDs to purge (mrg_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.PurgeMergeQueueArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for purging terminal merge queue entries.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PurgeMergeQueueArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Optional vessel ID filter (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.PurgeMergeQueueArgs.Status
member.summary: Optional status filter (Landed, Failed, or Cancelled).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.RestoreArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for the armada_restore command.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.RestoreArgs.FilePath
member.summary: Path to the ZIP backup file to restore from.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.SignalSendArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for sending a signal to a captain.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.SignalSendArgs.CaptainId
member.summary: Target captain ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.SignalSendArgs.Message
member.summary: Signal message.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.StatusFilterArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for filtering by status.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.StatusFilterArgs.Status
member.summary: Status filter value.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpBackupTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for backup and restore operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpBackupTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings)
member.summary: Registers backup and restore MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Armada settings for backup path configuration.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpCaptainTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for captain operations (get, create, update, stop, delete, log).
Registers captain MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for captain data access.
Armada settings, or null if unavailable.
Optional callback invoked when a captain is stopped.
Optional lifecycle handler used for model validation.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpDockTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for dock operations (get, delete, purge).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpDockTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IDockService)
member.summary: Registers dock MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for dock data access.
Optional dock service for worktree operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpEnumerateTools
member.summary: Registers the MCP enumerate tool for paginated, filtered entity browsing.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpEnumerateTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IMergeQueueService)
member.summary: Registers the enumerate MCP tool with the server.
member.param: Optional merge queue service for merge queue enumeration.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpEventTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for event operations (delete single, delete multiple).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpEventTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver)
member.summary: Registers event MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for event data access.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpFleetTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for fleet CRUD operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpFleetTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver)
member.summary: Registers fleet MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for fleet data access.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpMergeQueueTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for merge queue operations (get, enqueue, cancel, process, delete, purge).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpMergeQueueTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IMergeQueueService)
member.summary: Registers merge queue MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Merge queue service for queue operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpMissionTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for mission operations (status, create, update, cancel, purge, restart, transition, diff, log).
Registers mission MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for mission data access.
Armada settings, or null if unavailable.
Git service for diff operations, or null if unavailable.
Optional landing service for mission landing operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPersonaTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for persona CRUD operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPersonaTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver)
member.summary: Registers persona MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for persona data access.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPipelineTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for pipeline CRUD operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPipelineTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver)
member.summary: Registers pipeline MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for pipeline data access.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPromptTemplateTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for prompt template operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpPromptTemplateTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IPromptTemplateService)
member.summary: Registers prompt template MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for prompt template data access.
Prompt template service for resolve and reset operations.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpSignalTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for signal operations (send, delete).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpSignalTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver)
member.summary: Registers signal MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for signal data access.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpStatusTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for status and server lifecycle operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpStatusTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers status and server lifecycle MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Optional callback invoked when the server stop tool is triggered.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers
member.summary: Shared helper methods used by MCP tool registration classes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.IsValidTransition(Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum,Armada.Core.Enums.MissionStatusEnum)
member.summary: Checks whether a mission status transition is valid.
member.returns: True if the transition is allowed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.GetRecordCountsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get record counts for all Armada tables.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.ReadTextFileSafeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Read a text file safely, allowing concurrent writes from other processes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.ReadLogFileSafeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Read a log file safely as lines, allowing concurrent writes from other processes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.PerformBackupAsync(Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings,System.String)
member.summary: Perform a backup of the database and settings into a ZIP file.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpToolHelpers.PerformRestoreAsync(Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Restore the database and settings from a ZIP backup file.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVesselTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for vessel CRUD operations.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVesselTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IDockService)
member.summary: Registers vessel MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for vessel data access.
Optional dock service for worktree cleanup during vessel deletion.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVesselTools.CleanupVesselResourcesAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Vessel,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IDockService)
member.summary: Cleans up ALL filesystem and database resources associated with a vessel before deletion. Cancels active missions, removes docks/worktrees, and deletes the bare repository. This method throws on failure -- vessel deletion should NOT proceed if cleanup fails.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVoyageTools
member.summary: Registers MCP tools for voyage operations (dispatch, status, cancel, purge).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVoyageTools.Register(Armada.Server.Mcp.RegisterToolDelegate,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Services.Interfaces.IAdmiralService,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings)
member.summary: Registers voyage MCP tools with the server.
member.param: Database driver for voyage data access.
Optional settings for log/diff cleanup during purge.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Mcp.Tools.McpVoyageTools.CleanupMissionResourcesAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Mission,Armada.Core.Database.DatabaseDriver,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings)
member.summary: Cleans up filesystem resources associated with a mission (dock/worktree, log files, diff files). Cleanup failures are silently caught to avoid blocking the mission delete.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for adding a vessel.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.Name
member.summary: Display name for the vessel.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.RepoUrl
member.summary: Git repository URL (HTTPS or SSH).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.FleetId
member.summary: Fleet ID to add the vessel to.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.DefaultBranch
member.summary: Default branch name (defaults to main).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.ProjectContext
member.summary: Project context describing architecture, key files, and dependencies.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.StyleGuide
member.summary: Style guide describing naming conventions, patterns, and library preferences.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: Optional local working directory where completed mission changes will be pulled after merge.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.AllowConcurrentMissions
member.summary: Whether to allow multiple concurrent missions on this vessel. Default false.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.EnableModelContext
member.summary: Whether to enable model context accumulation on this vessel. Default false.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselAddArgs.DefaultPipelineId
member.summary: Default pipeline ID for dispatches to this vessel (ppl_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselContextArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for updating a vessel's project context and style guide.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselContextArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselContextArgs.ProjectContext
member.summary: Project context describing architecture, key files, and dependencies.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselContextArgs.StyleGuide
member.summary: Style guide describing naming conventions, patterns, and library preferences.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselContextArgs.ModelContext
member.summary: Agent-accumulated context about this repository.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a vessel identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselIdArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for updating a vessel.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Vessel ID (vsl_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.Name
member.summary: New display name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.RepoUrl
member.summary: New repository URL.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.DefaultBranch
member.summary: New default branch.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.ProjectContext
member.summary: New project context.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.StyleGuide
member.summary: New style guide.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.WorkingDirectory
member.summary: New local working directory where completed mission changes will be pulled after merge.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.AllowConcurrentMissions
member.summary: Whether to allow multiple concurrent missions on this vessel.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.EnableModelContext
member.summary: Whether to enable model context accumulation on this vessel.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.ModelContext
member.summary: Agent-accumulated context about this repository.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VesselUpdateArgs.DefaultPipelineId
member.summary: Default pipeline ID for dispatches to this vessel (ppl_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for dispatching a voyage with missions.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.Title
member.summary: Voyage title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.Description
member.summary: Voyage description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.VesselId
member.summary: Target vessel ID.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.Missions
member.summary: List of missions to create.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.PipelineId
member.summary: Pipeline ID to use for this dispatch (overrides vessel/fleet default).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageDispatchArgs.Pipeline
member.summary: Pipeline name to use (convenience alias for pipelineId -- resolves by name).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageIdArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments containing a voyage identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageIdArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: Voyage ID (vyg_ prefix).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs
member.summary: MCP tool arguments for armada_voyage_status.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.VoyageId
member.summary: Voyage ID (vyg_ prefix).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.Summary
member.summary: Return summary only: voyage metadata plus mission counts by status (default true). When true, no mission objects are embedded.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.IncludeMissions
member.summary: Include full mission objects in the response (default false). Only applies when summary is false.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.IncludeDescription
member.summary: Include Description field on embedded missions (default false).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.IncludeDiffs
member.summary: Include saved diff for each mission (default false).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.Mcp.VoyageStatusArgs.IncludeLogs
member.summary: Include log excerpt for each mission (default false). Currently reserved for future use -- logs are stored in external files and are not available on the mission object.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler
member.summary: Handles mission landing orchestration: diff capture, merge/PR flows, voyage completion, and PR reconciliation.

member.name: F:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler._VesselMergeLocks
member.summary: Per-vessel semaphores to prevent concurrent merge operations on the same repository.
Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.SetWebSocketHub(Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub)
member.summary: Set or update the WebSocket hub reference (created after this handler).

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.HandleCaptureDiffAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Mission,Armada.Core.Models.Dock)
member.summary: Capture diff and commit hash for a mission before worktree reclamation.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.HandleMissionCompleteAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Mission,Armada.Core.Models.Dock)
member.summary: Handle the full mission landing orchestration: resolve landing mode, merge/PR/enqueue, transition status, broadcast, and reclaim dock.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.HandleVoyageCompleteAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Voyage)
member.summary: Handle voyage completion by broadcasting to the dashboard.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.HandleReconcilePullRequestAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Mission)
member.summary: Persistent PR reconciler: checks if a PullRequestOpen mission's PR has been merged. Called from the health-check loop via delegate. Returns true if the mission was reconciled.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.MissionLandingHandler.PollAndPullAfterMergeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,Armada.Core.Enums.BranchCleanupPolicyEnum)
member.summary: Poll for PR merge completion, pull latest, transition mission to Complete, and clean up branches.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.MissionRequest
member.summary: Request model for a mission within a voyage request.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.MissionRequest.Title
member.summary: Mission title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.MissionRequest.Description
member.summary: Mission description.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.MissionRestartRequest
member.summary: Request model for restarting a failed or cancelled mission with optional instruction changes.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.MissionRestartRequest.Title
member.summary: Optional new title. If null or empty, the original title is preserved.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.MissionRestartRequest.Description
member.summary: Optional new description/instructions. If null or empty, the original description is preserved.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.Program
member.summary: Admiral server entry point.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.RemoteControlManagementService
member.summary: Handles remote-control management actions routed through the outbound tunnel.
Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteControlManagementService.HandleAsync(Armada.Core.Models.RemoteTunnelEnvelope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handle a remote-control management request.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.RemoteControlQueryService
member.summary: Handles focused remote-control queries routed through the outbound tunnel.
Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteControlQueryService.HandleAsync(Armada.Core.Models.RemoteTunnelEnvelope,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handle a focused tunnel query.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager
member.summary: Maintains Armada's outbound remote-control tunnel connection. v0.6.0 ships the Armada-side tunnel foundation only: URL normalization, capability handshake, heartbeat/ping, reconnect, and status telemetry.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.OnHandleRequest
member.summary: Optional request handler for proxy-initiated tunnel requests.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.#ctor(SyslogLogging.LoggingModule,Armada.Core.Settings.ArmadaSettings)
member.summary: Instantiate.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.Start(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the background tunnel-management loop.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.StopAsync
member.summary: Stop the background tunnel-management loop.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.ReloadAsync
member.summary: Reload the tunnel manager so updated settings apply immediately.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.GetStatus
member.summary: Get a copy of the current tunnel status.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.PublishEventAsync(System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish a server-side event to the connected proxy, if any.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.TryNormalizeTunnelUrl(System.String,System.Uri@,System.String@)
member.summary: Normalize a configured tunnel URL to a websocket URI.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.BuildCapabilityManifest
member.summary: Build the capability manifest sent during handshake.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.RemoteTunnelManager.ComputeReconnectDelay(Armada.Core.Settings.RemoteControlSettings,System.Int32)
member.summary: Compute the reconnect delay with capped exponential backoff and jitter.
member.returns: Delay before the next reconnect attempt.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.Routes.VesselRoutes.CleanupVesselResourcesAsync(Armada.Core.Models.Vessel)
member.summary: Cleans up filesystem and database resources associated with a vessel before deletion. Removes docks/worktrees, the bare repository, and cancels active missions. Cleanup failures are silently caught to avoid blocking the vessel delete.
Cleans up ALL resources associated with a vessel. Throws on failure.

member.summary: Run a git command and return stdout.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest
member.summary: Request model for partial update of server settings.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.AdmiralPort
member.summary: Admiral REST API port (1-65535).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.McpPort
member.summary: MCP server port (1-65535).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.MaxCaptains
member.summary: Maximum captains allowed (0 = unlimited).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.HeartbeatIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Heartbeat check interval in seconds (>= 5).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.StallThresholdMinutes
member.summary: Stall detection threshold in minutes (>= 1).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.IdleCaptainTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Idle captain timeout in seconds (0 = disabled).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.AutoCreatePr
member.summary: Whether to auto-create pull requests on mission completion.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.SettingsUpdateRequest.RemoteControl
member.summary: Optional remote-control tunnel settings update. When supplied, replaces the full remoteControl settings object.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.StatusTransitionRequest
member.summary: Request model for transitioning a mission to a new status.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.StatusTransitionRequest.Status
member.summary: Target status name (e.g. "Testing", "Review", "Complete").

member.name: T:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating or updating a user.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.TenantId
member.summary: Tenant identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.Email
member.summary: User email address.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.Password
member.summary: Optional plaintext password. If supplied, the server will hash it.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.PasswordSha256
member.summary: Optional pre-hashed password for backward compatibility.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.FirstName
member.summary: User's first name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.LastName
member.summary: User's last name.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.IsAdmin
member.summary: Whether the user has global admin privileges.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.IsTenantAdmin
member.summary: Whether the user has tenant admin privileges.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.UserUpsertRequest.Active
member.summary: Whether the user is active.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest
member.summary: Request model for creating a voyage via API.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.Title
member.summary: Voyage title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.Description
member.summary: Voyage description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.VesselId
member.summary: Target vessel identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.PipelineId
member.summary: Pipeline ID to use for this voyage (overrides vessel/fleet default).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.Pipeline
member.summary: Pipeline name to use (convenience alias for PipelineId -- resolves by name).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.VoyageRequest.Missions
member.summary: List of missions to create.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub
member.summary: WebSocket hub for real-time event broadcasting. Supports subscribe/command routes and broadcasts mission/captain state changes. Provides full command parity with the REST API and MCP tools.
Instantiate the WebSocket hub.
member.param: Optional Armada settings for log/diff paths.
Optional git service for diff generation.
Optional callback invoked when stop_server is requested.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Start the WebSocket server.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub.BroadcastMissionChange(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Broadcast a mission state change to all connected clients.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub.BroadcastVoyageChange(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Broadcast a voyage state change to all connected clients.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub.BroadcastCaptainChange(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Broadcast a captain state change to all connected clients.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.ArmadaWebSocketHub.BroadcastEvent(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Broadcast a generic event to all connected clients.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.MissionRestartData
member.summary: Data payload for the restart_mission WebSocket command.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.MissionRestartData.Title
member.summary: Optional new title. If null or empty, the original title is preserved.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.MissionRestartData.Description
member.summary: Optional new description/instructions. If null or empty, the original description is preserved.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand
member.summary: Envelope for WebSocket commands sent by clients. Covers all command shapes: ID-based, query-based, and status transitions.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Action
member.summary: Command action name (e.g. "list_fleets", "create_fleet").

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier (used by get, update, delete, transition commands).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Status
member.summary: Status value (used by transition_mission_status).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.CaptainId
member.summary: Captain identifier (used by stop_captain).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Query
member.summary: Enumeration query (used by list commands).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.EntityType
member.summary: Entity type for enumerate command (e.g. "fleets", "missions", "merge_queue").

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Lines
member.summary: Number of log lines to return (used by get_mission_log, get_captain_log).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.Offset
member.summary: Offset for log pagination (used by get_mission_log, get_captain_log).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.FilePath
member.summary: File path (used by restore command).

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand.OutputPath
member.summary: Output path (used by backup command).

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles all WebSocket command actions, extracted from the ArmadaWebSocketHub command route.
Instantiate the command handler.
member.param: Optional Armada settings for log/diff paths.
Optional git service for diff generation.
Optional callback invoked when stop_server is requested.
Callback to broadcast mission state changes.
Callback to broadcast voyage state changes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommandHandler.ReadFileSharedAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all text from a file using FileShare.ReadWrite to avoid locking conflicts with writer processes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommandHandler.ReadLinesSharedAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Reads all lines from a file using FileShare.ReadWrite to avoid locking conflicts with writer processes.

member.name: M:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommandHandler.HandleCommandAsync(System.String,Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketCommand,System.String)
member.summary: Handle a WebSocket command by dispatching to the appropriate action.
member.param: The action string from the command.
The raw JSON body string for data commands.
member.returns: The result object to serialize and send back to the client.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketDataCommand`1
member.summary: Generic WebSocket command wrapper for commands that include typed data. Used for create/update commands where the data field contains an entity.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketDataCommand`1.Data
member.summary: Typed data payload.

member.name: T:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketVoyageData
member.summary: Data payload for the create_voyage WebSocket command.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketVoyageData.Title
member.summary: Voyage title.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketVoyageData.Description
member.summary: Voyage description.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketVoyageData.VesselId
member.summary: Target vessel identifier.

member.name: P:Armada.Server.WebSocket.WebSocketVoyageData.Missions
member.summary: List of missions to create with the voyage.
